case_title: GREGORY LUM VS. TIANBING WANG et al

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST DONA E. COHN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-16-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-31-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - AS TO COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, TIANBING
DECLARATION OF PLTF'S ATTY DIANNA L. ALBINI IN RESPONSE TO COURT'S SANCTION ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUM, GREGORY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-12-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
